what_changed.text: Humanoid robots with advanced capabilities are increasingly deployed in manufacturing and logistics, signaling a shift toward robot-dominant workforce models.

strategic_signal.description: Humanoid robots with advanced capabilities are being increasingly deployed in manufacturing and logistics, with companies transitioning toward robot-dominant workforce models.
strategic_signal.watch_next_week: Monitor further announcements of robot workforce expansions and new commercial deployments.

why_it_matters.text: This shift enables companies to enhance operational efficiency and reduce labor costs, impacting workforce strategies and competitive positioning.
